steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage shifts from Monument 3 at La Venta in Tabasco to Monument 53 at San Lorenzo in Veracruz — two different archaeological sites in different regions. The blank must signal a move to a different location, nothing more.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — causal transition: implies the second site is a result or consequence of the first. No causal relationship is stated. ✗
  • Choice B — clarifying transition: implies the second sentence restates or explains the first. It introduces new information instead. ✗
  • Choice C — example transition: implies San Lorenzo is an example of something just mentioned. The passage treats it as a separate discovery. ✗
  • Choice D — 'elsewhere': signals movement to a different place, fitting the shift from La Venta to San Lorenzo. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
